name: tutorial-validation-gate
title: Validation Gate
description: Script validates data, then conditional routing passes or loops back for fixes. Demonstrates the validation gate pattern: a script step outputs {valid: true/false, errors: [...]}, transitions branch on output.valid, and the fix step feeds corrections back.

steps.name: Upload Data
steps.description: Paste or upload the data payload to validate.

steps.name: Validate Payload
steps.description: Run structural and business-rule validation on the uploaded payload.

steps.name: Fix Validation Errors
steps.description: Review the validation errors and submit a corrected payload.

steps.name: Confirm Valid Data
steps.description: Confirm the validated data is ready to proceed.
